guion_padre.introduccion: Welcome to Lesson 20. Today we will explore some wonderful sounds.
guion_padre.instruccion_or: Point to the big OR and say: ororor. Keep the sound going!
guion_padre.instruccion_aw: Now point to the big AW and say: awawaw.

parent_story: A tiger ate with a fork. He saw a bird claw on the straw in the yard.
